products.name: Midtown Eats
products.description: A complete multi-vendor POS for food courts and food halls — unified kiosk ordering, vendor-tagged payment routing, central orderboard, and automatic vendor payouts. Built on Clover.
features: Multi-vendor order routing with unified cart

products.name: Musubi
products.description: A first-party digital signage platform for Hawaii businesses — menu boards, promotional displays, and a local advertising network for restaurants, cafes, and retail locations.

products.name: Musubi
products.description: An Android and iOS remote-control app for Smart-KTV karaoke machines — Wi-Fi pairing with karaoke hardware, full playback control, in-room audio/video recording, and direct upload to YouTube and social platforms.
features: Wi-Fi pairing with karaoke hardware (TCP/IP + UDP)
Full remote control and song queue management
Audio and video recording per song
One-tap upload to YouTube and Facebook

products.name: Local
products.description: Run your campaign across our signage footprint — food halls, cafes, and retail venues across Oahu. Targeted by neighborhood and daypart, priced for local budgets.

products.name: Custom
products.description: POS integrations, Clover app development, signage installs, and bespoke tooling for restaurants and retailers that need something built right — not retrofitted.
